name: Banana Berry Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and slice them thinly. Place the slices on a cookie sheet and put it in the freezer. Allow them to freeze until solid.
2. Remove the frozen banana slices from the freezer and add them to the blender.
3. Slice the blueberries and add them to the blender as well.
4. Pour the plain yogurt into the blender.
5. Blend all the ingredients together until smooth.
6. Pour the smoothie into a glass and serve.
